name: idp-unified-platform
description: Intelligent Document Processing Unified Platform - Evaluate, Compare, Recommend

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:docs
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/*/dist packages/*/node_modules packages/docs/.next packages/docs/.source packages/docs/out node_modules
